title: 4plane
body:
# 4Plane
## 📖 What's the aim of this mod?
4Plane is a mod designed to introduce planes into the game. This mod was created because I believe it is more convenient to control planes using the camera.

## ✅ Features:
### General
All planes are customizable by shift-right-clicking them with a dye.
### Planes
- War plane (Rafale)
- Tourist plane
## 🎯 Objectives
### Blocks
Add new machine blocks to craft planes.
### Planes
Add more planes to the game.
### Technical
Improve the control laws of planes.
## 🧭 Contribution
You can contribute to the project on [GitHub](https://github.com/Samuel-Chapuis/4Plane)
